app.script:
df <- subset(get.input(), !is.na(height_m))
df$time_mean_s <- rowMeans(df[c("time_1_s", "time_2_s", "time_3_s")], na.rm = TRUE)
df$time_sd_s <- apply(df[c("time_1_s", "time_2_s", "time_3_s")], 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
df$time_sq_s2 <- df$time_mean_s^2
fit <- lm(height_m ~ 0 + time_sq_s2, data = df)
theme <- get.graph.settings()
plot(df$time_sq_s2, df$height_m,
  pch = 19, col = theme$accent, cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "mean time^2_s2", ylab = "height_m",
  main = "Free Fall"
)
arrows(df$time_sq_s2 - 2 * df$time_mean_s * df$time_sd_s, df$height_m,
  df$time_sq_s2 + 2 * df$time_mean_s * df$time_sd_s, df$height_m,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(a = 0, b = coef(fit)[1], col = theme$fg, lwd = 2)
print(df[c("height_m", "time_mean_s", "time_sd_s", "time_sq_s2")])
cat(sprintf("Estimated g: %.2f m/s^2\n", 2 * coef(fit)[1]))

runtimeStatus.text: サンプルを読み込みました
